## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance has plateaued; focus shifting to high-opportunity keyword topics](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New workflow for comparison pages content generation is ready; awaiting CMS field setup](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Integration pages inadvertently overwritten; list provided for manual updates](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [HubSpot page access issue to be addressed with Tori](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [New format: bullets at top of article with version info and relevant links](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Author names added to refreshed blogs](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Team to review and confirm approval of new format](https://fathom.video/share/EtbzPkR7DnsvgkRvQgFNUTkaELMbbwWp?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
